figures.caption: Figure 4: Worst AUROC across all DRG subgroups for different methods. The sample size n here represents the sample size for each DRG.
Table 2: Number of observations and 30-day unplanned readmission or death rate by MDC index.
Figure 1: Illustration of the hierarchical nested structure of the DRGs and MDCs and how our parameter decomposition aligns with this structure.
Table 1: Main algorithm for solving the hierNest OGLasso problem.

Figure 5: Prediction performance within the different validation sets of external hospital observations (external validation) or the Year of 2020 observations (internal observations). We compare the MDCspecific AUPRC(top) and the AUROC(bot) for the compared methods. The black bar represents the median MDC-specific AUCs, and the red bar represents the mean MDC-specific AUCs. Each scatter point represents a single MDC-specific AUC for each MDC subgroup.
Figure 3: Average AUROC across all DRG subgroups for different methods. The sample size n here represents the sample size for each DRG.
